abstract: Oracle and Interest Rate Model guide for Euler Finance V2 protocol. Covers deploying oracle adapters (Chainlink, Pyth, Chronicle, RedStone, Pendle), configuring EulerRouter for price resolution, querying asset prices, and understanding IRM types (Linear Kink, Linear Kinky, Adaptive Curve, Fixed Cyclical Binary).
tldr: Deploy oracle adapters via factories (Chainlink, Pyth, Chronicle). Configure EulerRouter for price paths. Use getQuote() for prices. IRM types: Linear Kink (common), Adaptive Curve (dynamic).
